title: Xponential Fitness | Join Our Franchise Family
meta_description: Xponential Fitness is the largest fitness franchise group of boutique fitness brands across verticals including Pilates, Barre, Stretching, Boxing, and more.
body_markdown:
This website uses tracking technologies (collectively, “cookies”) to share your personal information with our affiliates, partners, and service providers to personalize your experience on our Online Services, including analyzing and tracking your activities on our websites, and to tailor advertising to your interests. Choosing to reject some or all cookies may impact your experience. Please see our [Privacy Policy](https://www.xponential.com/privacy-policy "Privacy Policy") for more information.
Customize Cookies

#### Recognized as the best, by the best.
Xponential Fitness is a curator of globally and nationally recognized boutique health and wellness brands across a variety of verticals including Pilates, barre, yoga, strength training, and stretching.
[ Inquire to Franchise > ](https://www.xponential.com/franchising)

## The Experiences
IN-STUDIO
Discover the community-based, engaging, small group class experience our brands offer.
[ Explore ](https://www.xponential.com/in-studio)
XPLUS
Welcome to the world’s best studio workouts, on demand.
[ Explore ](https://xponential.plus/)
CORPORATE WELLNESS
Elevate your corporate wellness program with a boutique benefit.
[ Explore ](https://www.xponential.com/corporate-wellness)

## 
Own a Studio
With decades of fitness, health & wellness, and franchising experience, Xponential is a leading health and wellness franchisor with the resources, network, playbook, and platform in place available to help support and grow our franchise owners every step of the way.
[ Inquire to Franchise > ](https://www.xponential.com/franchising)
